# Toolkit duty matrix

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/ci/duty-matrix.sh — do not edit by hand. CI diffs this file
     against a fresh run, so regenerate after changing the Toolkit trait or a backend. -->

Which backend implements which `Toolkit` duty (`crates/day-spec/src/lib.rs`). `✓` = the
backend defines the method; `·` = it inherits the day-spec default (a no-op or trivial
answer — day-spec documents each). Required duties have no default; every backend must
implement them, and this table proves it.

| duty | req | appkit | uikit | gtk | qt | winui | android | arkui | mock |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `capability` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `realize` | yes | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `update` | yes | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `release` | yes | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `insert` | yes | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `remove` | yes | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `move_child` | yes | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `measure` | yes | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `set_frame` | yes | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `set_opacity` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | · | ✓ | · | ✓ |
| `set_transform` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | · | ✓ | · | ✓ |
| `set_scroll_content` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `scroll_to` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `scroll_offset` | · | · | · | · | · | ✓ | · | · | ✓ |
| `set_event_sink` | yes | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `enable_gesture` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `focus` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `attach_list` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `set_app_menu` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | · | ✓ |
| `set_context_menu` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | · | ✓ |
| `supports_lifecycle` | · | · | ✓ | · | · | · | ✓ | · | ✓ |
| `set_a11y` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `read_a11y` | · | ✓ | ✓ | · | · | · | · | · | ✓ |
| `replay` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `snapshot_window` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `ui_idle` | · | · | ✓ | ✓ | · | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `present` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `dismiss` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | · | ✓ |
| `open_url` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| `defer_system_gestures` | · | · | ✓ | · | · | · | ✓ | · | ✓ |
| `dark_mode` | · | · | ✓ | · | · | · | ✓ | ✓ | · |
| `on_suspend` | · | · | · | · | · | · | · | · | ✓ |
| `on_resume` | · | · | · | · | · | · | · | · | ✓ |
| `on_memory_warning` | · | · | · | · | · | · | · | · | ✓ |
| `adopt` | · | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
